name: template-pixi-webgpu
description: Production-minded PixiJS 8 WebGPU-first starter and RUN.world SDK capability reference.

scripts.lint: biome lint src additional_features scripts vite.config.js --diagnostic-level=error --max-diagnostics=none
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && node scripts/check-build.mjs embedded
scripts.build:bundled: npm run typecheck && cross-env RUNDOT_GAME_DISABLE_EMBEDDED_LIBS=true vite build && node scripts/check-build.mjs bundled
scripts.build:multiplayer: npm run typecheck && cross-env RUNDOT_MULTIPLAYER=1 vite build && node scripts/check-build.mjs multiplayer
scripts.build:syncplay: npm run typecheck && cross-env RUNDOT_SYNCPLAY=1 vite build && node scripts/check-build.mjs syncplay
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build:bundled
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run build:multiplayer && npm run build:syncplay
